page_metadata.biotools__summary: Program that outputs a large amount of data on cell cycle phase, cell forms, etc., for individual cells, from a set of pictures of cell walls, cell nuclei, and actins.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Program that outputs a large amount of data on cell cycle phase, cell forms, etc., for individual cells, from a set of pictures of cell walls, cell nuclei, and actins.
